title: Scroll Hold VR
description:
Scroll Hold VR turns your favorite SteamVR game/app into a reading room.

 

• Load PDF/TXT directly from your PC

• Retains recently opened file list

• A lightweight SteamVR overlay that renders over other VR apps

• Hold documents in your hand or anchor them in your room

• Booklet mode - flip pages with page-gripping gestures or using thumbstick

• Continuous mode - navigate using scroll-drag or thumbstick

• Resize freely — from pocket paperback to wall-sized poster

• Minimal UI — the document is the interface

Requires SteamVR-compatible headset and controllers.
description_short: Read PDF/TXT in virtual reality - runs by itself or along with other VR apps as overlay, repositionable and resizable by dragging using controllers, supports continuous navigation and booklet mode
